description_long: This restaurant is a two-story building with a traditional Japanese architectural style, featuring a prominent green-tiled, multi-tiered roof with ornate gables and wooden structural elements. The facade is adorned with wooden beams, white plaster walls, and several red lanterns hanging from the eaves and entrance, adding a festive and inviting atmosphere. The main entrance is marked by a large red lantern with a white emblem, flanked by wooden columns and a small overhanging roof. The side of the building includes a covered walkway supported by wooden posts, and the windows are decorated with wooden latticework. The structure sits on a stone or concrete base, with a slightly irregular ground surface around it. Decorative elements such as circular window frames and intricate woodwork further enhance the building's traditional aesthetic.
description: A two-story traditional Japanese restaurant with green-tiled roofs, wooden beams, white plaster walls, and red lanterns adorning the entrance and eaves.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entrance with a large red lantern, ornate gables, and symmetrical wooden columns, highlighting the building's inviting facade.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the depth of the building, the covered walkway, and additional red lanterns, emphasizing the layered roof structure.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the building's back wall with circular window frames and wooden latticework, as well as the extended side structure.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the secondary entrance area, more red lanterns, and the continuation of the green-tiled roof design.
attribute_signage: A large red lantern with a white emblem is prominently displayed above the entrance, accompanied by several smaller red lanterns with no visible text.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features a harmonious blend of green-tiled, multi-tiered roofs with ornate wooden gables and beams. White plaster walls are accented by dark wooden framing and red lanterns, creating a visually striking and traditional appearance. Decorative elements such as circular window frames and intricate woodwork add to the building's authentic Japanese charm.
